examples: Preoperative Brain Injury in Transposition of the Great Arteries Is Associated With Oxygenation and Time to Surgery, Not Balloon Atrial Septostomy.

Conclusion Surgical management of TGA/IVS may yield good results, and application of balloon atrial septostomy and assisted circulation may further decrease the mortality after operation.
